rows.CNzh: 是生面孔哩。
rows.TWzh: 是生面孔哩。
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}はじ>初めて<Ruby={2:2}み>見る<Ruby={2:4}かお>顔さね
rows.USen: A new face!

rows.CNzh: 想要装备的话，来我家买吧。
rows.TWzh: 需要裝備能到我們店裡買。
rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:6}そうび>装備ならウチでお<Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:4}もと>求めを
rows.USen: You can buy armor here.

rows.CNzh: 不穿衣服也非常欢迎～
rows.TWzh: 就算沒穿衣服也歡迎光臨～
rows.JPja: ハダカでも<Ruby={6:12}だいかんげい>大歓迎～
rows.USen: We never turn folks away!

rows.CNzh: 这里有很好的装备～
rows.TWzh: 我們店裡有不錯的裝備喔～
rows.JPja: いい<Ruby={4:6}そうび>装備ありますよ～
rows.USen: Care to buy some clothes?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 97 108 108 70 97 114]>欢～迎光哩！
现在要出门哩？一大早上真有精神哩～
不要客气，多多购买哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 97 108 108 70 97 114]>歡～迎光哩～
你現在要出門哩？一大早就這麼有精神哩～
請你盡量～買哩。

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 97 108 108 70 97 114]>さ～ らっしゃい～

<Ruby={4:8}えんりょ>遠慮なくた～んと<Ruby={2:2}か>買ってくだわいさ
rows.USen:

early today.<PageBreak>Go ahead. Buy lots and lots!

lots and lots!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>现在要出门哩？
不好意思～现在全都卖光了哩～
我在<Color=red>故乡<Color=white>开杂货店的时候，
几乎没有能卖光的时候哩～
真的很感谢大家的惠顾哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>你現在要出門哩？
抱歉～現在所有商品都賣光哩。
我在<Color=red>故鄉<Color=white>經營雜貨店時，
幾乎沒遇過商品全都賣光的狀況哩～
真是感激不盡呀～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={2:4}いま>今からお<Ruby={2:2}で>出かけさね？
<Ruby={2:4}わる>悪いね～ <Ruby={2:4}いま>今み～んな<Ruby={2:2}う>売り<Ruby={2:2}き>切れさね
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}こきょう>故郷<Color=white>でよろず<Ruby={2:2}や>屋やってた<Ruby={2:4}とき>時には
<Ruby={2:2}う>売り<Ruby={2:2}き>切れるなんて ほとんどなかったわいさ～
ありがたいねぇ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I'm afraid you caught us at a bad time.
We're sold out of everything.<PageBreak>This is not the pace I'm used to.
The general store I ran in my <Color=red>hometown<Color=white>
almost never sold out.<PageBreak>Anyway, thank you for dropping by!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 97 108 108 70 97 114]>欢～迎光哩！
唔唔……你是……初次光顾的客人哩？
这里是监视堡垒唯一的商店哩。
虽然店铺看着像是赶工出来的，
但我在<Color=red>故乡<Color=white>也是开杂货店的，
所以对商品很有自信哩。<Color=red><Color=white>
今后请多多关照哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 97 108 108 70 97 114]>歡～迎光哩～
那個……你是……初次造訪的客人哩？
這裡是監視堡壘唯一的商店哩。
雖然我這看上去像急就章完成的商店，
但是我曾在<Color=red>故鄉<Color=white>經營過雜貨店，
所以我對店內商品相當有自信哩。
今後請多關照哩～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 97 108 108 70 97 114]>さ～ らっしゃい～<unk[5:0]>
ええっとぉ… <Ruby={2:4}はじ>初めまして… のお<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんさね？
ここは<Ruby={6:12}かんしとりで>監視砦で<Ruby={4:8}ゆいいつ>唯一のお<Ruby={2:4}みせ>店だわいさ
<Ruby={2:2}み>見た<Ruby={2:2}め>目は<Ruby={2:6}きゅう>急ごしらえだけど
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}こきょう>故郷<Color=white>でもよろず<Ruby={2:2}や>屋をやってたから
<Ruby={4:8}しなぞろ>品揃えには<Ruby={4:6}じしん>自信があるさね<Color=red><Color=white>
<Ruby={4:6}こんご>今後とも よろしくなんだわいさ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 97 108 108 70 97 114]>Heeey! Welcome! It's your first time at
my store, right?<PageBreak>It's the only place to shop here in
Lookout Landing. I know it looks a
little thrown together...
But I stock a nice selection of goods.
I ran a store back in my <Color=red>hometown<Color=white>, so
I hope you'll support my place here!

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:14 67 97 108 108 70 97 114]>Heeey! Welcome! It's your first time at
my store, right?<PageBreak>It's the only place to shop here in
Lookout Landing. I know it looks a
little thrown together.
But I stock a nice selection of goods.
I ran a store back in my <Color=red>hometown<Color=white>, so
I hope you'll support my place here!
<unk[3:0:8]>I'm really proud of the <Color=red>Hateno cheese<Color=white>
that I'm now able to bring in from
<Color=red>Hateno Village<Color=white>.<PageBreak>That village is in Necluda—far, far away
in the southeast on its distant edge.
So that cheese is a real rarity here!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>没法儿在<Color=red>故乡<Color=white>做的生意，
就让我在这里赚回来哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>沒辦法在<Color=red>故鄉<Color=white>做生意所損失的部分，
就讓我在這裡賺回來哩～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><Ruby={4:8}こきょう>故郷<Color=white>で<Ruby={4:10}しょうばい>商売ができなくなった<Ruby={2:4}ぶん>分
ここで<Ruby={2:4}かせ>稼がせてもらうだわいさ～

<unk[3:0:7]>I had to close up shop in my <Color=red>hometown<Color=white>.
It just wasn't possible to do business
there anymore...

<unk[3:0:7]>没法儿在<Color=red>故乡<Color=white>做的生意，

ハテノ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村から<Ruby={2:2}と>取り<Ruby={2:2}よ>寄せた <Ruby={2:6}めずら>珍しい<Ruby={2:4}しな>品なんだわさ～

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I had to close up shop in my <Color=red>hometown<Color=white>.
It just wasn't possible to do business
there anymore...
Ah! Do you like cheese? My shipment
of <Color=red>Hateno cheese <Color=white>just arrived!<PageBreak>It's a rare product imported from
<Color=red>Hateno Village <Color=white>in Necluda to the
southeast! I highly recommend it!
We appreciate your business!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我相信总有一天能够回到<Color=red>故乡<Color=white>，
眼下就在这里赚钱哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我相信總有一天能回到<Color=red>故鄉<Color=white>，
現在就讓我在這好好賺錢哩～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>いつか<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}こきょう>故郷<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:4}かえ>帰れると<Ruby={2:4}しん>信じて
<Ruby={2:4}いま>今はここで<Ruby={2:4}かせ>稼がせてもらうわいさ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Someday, I'll be able to go back to
my <Color=red>hometown<Color=white>. And until then, I'll sell
as much stuff as I can!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>谢谢你带来沃托里村的消息，
真的很感谢哩……
我们会在这里努力做生意，
相信海盗总有一天会消失哩！
好了，做生意、做生意哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>真的很謝謝你
為我帶來沃托里村的消息哩……
我們相信總有一天海盜會消失，
所以一直在這裡努力做生意哩！
好啦，工作～工作～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>ウオトリー<Ruby={2:4}むら>村の<Ruby={2:4}こと>事を<Ruby={2:2}し>知らせてくれて
<Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当に ありがとうだわいさ…
あたいらは <Ruby={4:8}かいぞく>海賊がいなくなる<Ruby={2:2}ひ>日を<Ruby={2:4}しん>信じて
ここでの<Ruby={4:10}しょうばい>商売を<Ruby={4:6}がんば>頑張るさね！
さあ <Ruby={4:12}しょうばい >商売～ <Ruby={4:12} しょうばい>商売～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>So you went to Lurelin Village. Thanks for
telling me about what's happening there.

I know those pirates will be gone
someday...and in the meantime, I'll work
hard at running my business here!
Back to it!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>谢谢你带来沃托里村的消息，
真的很感谢哩。
既然海盗把村子弄得一团糟，
那下一步就是重建沃托里村哩！
<unk[3:0:1]>村里的人们都在努力搞建设，
我们在这里也要勤勤恳才行哩！
好了，做生意、做生意～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>真的很謝謝你
為我帶來沃托里村的消息哩……
海盜們似乎把村子搞得一團糟，
接下來得重建沃托里村哩！
<unk[3:0:1]>村民們也非常努力，
所以我也得好好在這工作才行哩～
好了，做生意～做生意！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ウオトリー<Ruby={2:4}むら>村のこと<Ruby={2:2}し>知らせてくれて
<Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当に ありがとうだわいさ
<Ruby={4:8}かいぞく>海賊たちは <Ruby={6:12}さんざんむら>散々村を<Ruby={2:2}あ>荒らしていたようだし
<Ruby={2:4}つぎ>次は ウオトリー<Ruby={2:4}むら>村の<Ruby={4:8}さいけん>再建さね！
<unk[3:0:1]><Ruby={2:4}むら>村の<Ruby={4:8}ひとたち>人達も<Ruby={4:6}がんば>頑張ってるんだから
あたいらもここで しっかり<Ruby={4:6}がんば>頑張らないと！
さあ <Ruby={4:12}しょうばい >商売～ <Ruby={4:12} しょうばい>商売～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>So you went to <Color=red>Lurelin Village<Color=white>.
I appreciate you updating me on
the situation there...
I'm sorry those pirates trashed the place.
Undoing the damage will take hard work—<unk[5:0]>
and hard cash.
<unk[3:0:1]>Because my husband frankly doesn't
make much money, I'd better work extra
hard so we can pitch in!
Back to it!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>谢谢你带来沃托里村的消息，
真的很感谢哩。
看来被海盗们破坏的村子
也已经恢复原样，
那我也能毫无顾虑地
在这里做生意哩。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>真的很謝謝你
為我帶來沃托里村的消息哩。
被海盜們弄亂的村子
似乎恢復原狀了。
我也可以放下心來，
好好在這做生意哩。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ウオトリー<Ruby={2:4}むら>村のこと<Ruby={2:2}し>知らせてくれて
<Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当に ありがとうだわいさ
<Ruby={4:8}かいぞく>海賊たちに<Ruby={2:2}あ>荒らされていた<Ruby={2:4}むら>村も
<Ruby={4:8}もとどお>元通りになったようだし
あたいも<Ruby={4:8}こころお>心置きなく
ここで<Ruby={4:10}しょうばい>商売できるわいさ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>Thanks for telling me about the situation
in Lurelin Village.

I can't tell you how upset I was when
I heard how those pirates had trashed
everything.
Now I'll be able to do business with a
clear head.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>……唔，你等一下哩！

我好像瞥见你身上带着
上等布料哩～
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>不如趁这个难得的机会，

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>せっかくなら ハテノ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村にある<Ruby={6:12}せんしょくや>染色屋で

I couldn't help but notice that lovely

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Have you thought about bringing it to
the dye shop in Hateno Village?

That's a hamlet on the edge of Necluda,
southeast of here.

It's not exactly close, but I think you'll
find it's well worth the journey!

rows.CNzh: 故乡？
rows.TWzh: 故鄉？
rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:8}こきょう>故郷？
rows.USen: Your hometown?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的故乡是<Color=red>沃托里村<Color=white>哩。

是一个位于非常<Color=red>南面的角落<Color=white>上的村子，
被人们称作“<Color=red>最南端<Color=white>的村子”哩。
<unk[3:0:10]>但有一天，<Color=red>海盗<Color=white>出现了……<unk[5:2]>

我本来是在村里开<Color=red>杂货店<Color=white>的，
当时没来得及多想，抱着货物就逃了出来。
也不知道村子现在情况如何了……

<unk[3:0:7]>不过，我相信总有一天能够回到故乡，
眼下要努力做生意才行哩～
想要什么就直接选中，告诉我哩！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的故鄉是<Color=red>沃托里村<Color=white>哩。

那是一座位於<Color=red>最南端角落<Color=white>的村子，
甚至被人們稱作為<Color=red>最南端<Color=white>之村哩。
<unk[3:0:10]>然而有一天，<Color=red>海盜<Color=white>突然出現在村子裡……<unk[5:2]>

我當時在村裡經營<Color=red>雜貨店<Color=white>，
得知有海盜出現當下，我就慌忙帶著商品出逃了。
不曉得現在村裡的狀況如何……

<unk[3:0:7]>不過我相信總有一天能回到村子，
為此我現在得努力做生意才行哩～
請直接挑選想要的商品後跟我說一聲哩！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={4:8}こきょう>故郷は<Color=red>ウオトリー<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>さね

<Color=red><Ruby={6:12}さいなんたん>最南端<Color=white>の<Ruby={2:4}むら>村って<Ruby={2:2}よ>呼ばれてるぐらい
ずーっと<Color=red><Ruby={2:6}みなみ>南の<Ruby={2:4}はし>端っこ<Color=white>にある<Ruby={2:4}むら>村なんだわいさ
<unk[3:0:10]>でも ある<Ruby={2:2}ひ>日 <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいぞく>海賊<Color=white>が<Ruby={2:6}あらわ>現れて…<unk[5:2]>

あたいは <Ruby={2:4}むら>村で<Color=red>よろず<Ruby={2:2}や>屋<Color=white>をやってたんだけど
とにかく <Ruby={2:2}う>売り<Ruby={2:4}もの>物を<Ruby={2:4}かか>抱えて <Ruby={2:2}に>逃げだしてきたのさ
<Ruby={2:4}いま>今は<Ruby={4:8}いったい>一体どうなってるのか…

<unk[3:0:7]>でも いつか<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻れる<Ruby={2:2}ひ>日が<Ruby={2:2}く>来ると<Ruby={2:4}しん>信じて
<Ruby={2:4}いま>今は<Ruby={8:16}しょうばいがんば>商売頑張らないとだわさ～
<Ruby={2:2}ほ>欲しいモンは <Ruby={6:14}ちょくせつえら>直接選んで<Ruby={2:4}おし>教えてほしいさね！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I come from a small fishing town called
<Color=red>Lurelin Village<Color=white>.<PageBreak>It's waaay to the <Color=red>south<Color=white>, on the
<Color=red>southeastern corner <Color=white>of Hyrule. Used to
be a peaceful place too.
<unk[3:0:10]>Then the <Color=red>pirates <Color=white>arrived.<PageBreak>I used to run the village's <Color=red>general store<Color=white>.
But when those pirates arrived, I had to
grab all the goods I could carry and run.<PageBreak>I... <unk[5:0]>I don't know how it's going there now.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:7]>I hope I can return someday. But for
now, I'll just keep selling as much stuff
as I can!
Please, let me know if there's anything
you'd like!

rows.CNzh: 再见
rows.TWzh: 再見
rows.JPja: さようなら
rows.USen: Goodbye.

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>ポーチがパンパンで<Ruby={2:4}はい>入らんさね～

<Ruby={4:6}ふよう>不要なものがあったら
ウチで <Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:2}と>取りも<Ruby={4:4}でき>出来るわいさ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>Looks like your pouch is full. Nothing else
will fit in there.<PageBreak>If there's anything you don't need, I can
buy it off you.

rows.CNzh:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:8]><Color=white>好哩，好哩。
买到了好东西哩～
rows.TWzh:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:8]><Color=white>好哩～好哩～
買到好東西哩～
rows.JPja:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:8]><Color=white>いいさね いいさね
<Ruby={2:2}い>良い<Ruby={2:4}しな>品が<Ruby={2:2}か>買えたさね～
rows.USen: <Color=red><unk[3:0:8]><Color=white>Goody, goody! I'm glad I got that!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>谢谢你哩。
我还能继续收购哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>謝謝你哩。
我還能繼續收購哩～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ありがとうさね
まだまだ<Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:2}と>取るわいさ～
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:8]>Thanks! I'll buy more if you'd like!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>谢谢哩～
让我做了一笔不错的买卖哩。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>謝謝你哩～
成交了一筆好交易哩。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ありがとうだわいさ～
いい<Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:4}もの>物させてもらったさね
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:8]>Thank you very much! Good haul!

rows.CNzh:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:264]><Color=white>有其他想卖的东西哩？
我会拿来当以后回故乡的资金哩～
rows.TWzh:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:264]><Color=white>還有其他想賣的東西哩？
我要將其變成以後回故鄉的資金哩～
rows.JPja:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:264]><Color=white><Ruby={2:4}ほか>他に<Ruby={2:2}う>売りたいものはあるさね？
いつか<Ruby={4:8}こきょう>故郷に<Ruby={2:4}かえ>帰るための <Ruby={4:6}しきん>資金にするわいさ～
rows.USen:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:264]><Color=white>Anything else to sell? The more I put on
my shelves, the more money I'll make—<unk[5:0]>
and the sooner I can go back home.

rows.CNzh:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:264]><Color=white>还有其他的哩？
你愿意卖的话，我丈夫也会很高兴哩～
rows.TWzh:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:264]><Color=white>還有其他東西要賣哩？
你肯賣的話，我丈夫也會感到很高興哩～
rows.JPja:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:264]><Color=white><Ruby={2:4}ほか>他にはあるさね？
<Ruby={2:2}う>売ってくれると<Ruby={4:6}だんな>旦那も<Ruby={2:6}よろこ>喜ぶわいさ～
rows.USen:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:264]><Color=white>Are you gonna sell me anything else?
It'd make me happy, and my husband too!

rows.CNzh: <unk[3:0:264]>请慢慢挑选哩～
rows.TWzh: <unk[3:0:264]>請慢慢挑哩～
rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:264]>じっくり<Ruby={2:4}えら>選ぶわいさ～
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:264]>Take your time making a selection!

rows.CNzh: 好
rows.TWzh: 要
rows.JPja: はい
rows.USen: Yes.

rows.CNzh: 不好
rows.TWzh: 不要
rows.JPja: いいえ
rows.USen: No.

rows.CNzh: 买
rows.TWzh: 買
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:2}か>買う
rows.USen: I'll buy.

rows.CNzh: 还是算了
rows.TWzh: 還是算了
rows.JPja: やっぱりやめる
rows.USen: Never mind.

rows.CNzh: 全买了
rows.TWzh: 全買了
rows.JPja: ぜんぶ<Ruby={2:2}か>買う
rows.USen: I'll buy them all!

rows.TWzh: 全賣了
rows.JPja: ぜんぶ<Ruby={2:2}う>売る
